004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
027
028/**
029 * Represents an entry in {@link ThrownStore}.
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ExecutionStatistics">REST method execution statistics</a>
033 * </ul>
034 */
035@SuppressWarnings({
036   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_causedBy)
037})
038public class ThrownStats {
039
040   // Property name constants
041   private static final String PROP_causedBy = "causedBy";
042   private static final String PROP_count = "count";
043   private static final String PROP_firstMessage = "firstMessage";
044   private static final String PROP_firstOccurrence = "firstOccurrence";
045   private static final String PROP_guid = "guid";
046   private static final String PROP_hash = "hash";
047   private static final String PROP_lastOccurrence = "lastOccurrence";
048   private static final String PROP_stackTrace = "stackTrace";
049   private static final String PROP_thrownClass = "thrownClass";
050
051   /**
052    * Builder class.
053    */
054   public static class Builder {
055
056      final BeanStore beanStore;
057      Throwable throwable;
058      long hash;
059      List<String> stackTrace;
060      ThrownStats causedBy;
061
062      private Class<? extends ThrownStats> implType;
063
064      /**
065       * Constructor.
066       *
067       * @param beanStore The bean store to use for creating beans.
068       */
069      protected Builder(BeanStore beanStore) {
070         this.beanStore = beanStore;
071      }
072
073      /**
074       * Create a new {@link ThrownStats} using this builder.
075       *
076       * @return A new {@link ThrownStats}
077       */
078      public ThrownStats build() {
079         var t = implType != null ? implType : ThrownStats.class;
080         return BeanInstantiator.of(ThrownStats.class, beanStore)
081            .type(t)
082            .noBuilder()
083            .addBean(Builder.class, this)
084            .run();
085      }
086
087      /**
088       * Specifies the caused-by exception.
089       *
090       * @param value The new value for this setting.
091       * @return This object.
092       */
093      public Builder causedBy(ThrownStats value) {
094         causedBy = value;
095         return this;
096      }
097
098      /**
099       * Specifies the calculated hash.
100       *
101       * @param value The new value for this setting.
102       * @return This object.
103       */
104      public Builder hash(long value) {
105         hash = value;
106         return this;
107      }
108
109      /**
110       * Specifies the normalized stacktrace.
111       *
112       * @param value The new value for this setting.
113       * @return This object.
114       */
115      public Builder stackTrace(List<String> value) {
116         stackTrace = value;
117         return this;
118      }
119
120      /**
121       * Specifies the thrown exception.
122       *
123       * @param value The new value for this setting.
124       * @return This object.
125       */
126      public Builder throwable(Throwable value) {
127         throwable = value;
128         return this;
129      }
130
131      /**
132       * Specifies a subclass of {@link ThrownStats} to create when the {@link #build()} method is called.
133       *
134       * @param value The new value for this setting.
135       * @return This object.
136       */
137      public Builder type(Class<? extends ThrownStats> value) {
138         implType = o(value).isPresent() ? value : ThrownStats.class;
139         return this;
140      }
141   }
142
143   /**
144    * Static creator.
145    *
146    * @param beanStore The bean store to use for creating beans.
147    * @return A new builder for this object.
148    */
149   public static Builder create(BeanStore beanStore) {
150      return new Builder(beanStore);
151   }
152
153   private final long guid;
154   private final long hash;
155   private final Class<?> thrownClass;
156   private final String firstMessage;
157   private final List<String> stackTrace;
158   private final Optional<ThrownStats> causedBy;
159
160   private final AtomicInteger count;
161   private final AtomicLong firstOccurrence;
162   private final AtomicLong lastOccurrence;
163
164   /**
165    * Copy constructor.
166    */
167   private ThrownStats(ThrownStats x) {
168      this.guid = x.guid;
169      this.thrownClass = x.thrownClass;
170      this.firstMessage = x.firstMessage;
171      this.stackTrace = u(copyOf(x.stackTrace));
172      this.causedBy = o(x.causedBy.isPresent() ? ThrownStats.copy(x.causedBy.get()) : null);
173      this.hash = x.hash;
174      this.count = new AtomicInteger(x.count.get());
175      this.firstOccurrence = new AtomicLong(x.firstOccurrence.get());
176      this.lastOccurrence = new AtomicLong(x.lastOccurrence.get());
177   }
178
179   /**
180    * Creates a copy of this stats object.
181    *
182    * @param stats The stats object to copy.
183    * @return A new stats instance with copied values.
184    */
185   public static ThrownStats copy(ThrownStats stats) {
186      return new ThrownStats(stats);
187   }
188
189   /**
190    * Constructor.
191    *
192    * @param builder The builder for this object.
193    */
194   protected ThrownStats(Builder builder) {
195      this.guid = new Random().nextLong();
196      this.thrownClass = builder.throwable.getClass();
197      this.firstMessage = builder.throwable.getMessage();
198      this.stackTrace = u(copyOf(builder.stackTrace));
199      this.causedBy = o(builder.causedBy);
200      this.hash = builder.hash;
201      this.count = new AtomicInteger(0);
202      long ct = System.currentTimeMillis();
203      this.firstOccurrence = new AtomicLong(ct);
204      this.lastOccurrence = new AtomicLong(ct);
205   }
206
207
208   /**
209    * Returns the stats on the caused-by exception.
210    *
211    * @return The stats on the caused-by exception, never <jk>null</jk>.
212    */
213   public Optional<ThrownStats> getCausedBy() { return causedBy; }
214
215   /**
216    * Returns the number of times this exception occurred at a specific location in code.
217    *
218    * @return The number of times this exception occurred at a specific location in code.
219    */
220   public int getCount() { return count.intValue(); }
221
222   /**
223    * Returns the message of the first exception at a specific location in code.
224    *
225    * @return The message of the first exception at a specific location in code.
226    */
227   public String getFirstMessage() { return firstMessage; }
228
229   /**
230    * Returns the UTC time of the first occurrence of this exception at a specific location in code.
231    *
232    * @return The UTC time of the first occurrence of this exception at a specific location in code.
233    */
234   public long getFirstOccurrence() { return firstOccurrence.longValue(); }
235
236   /**
237    * Returns a globally unique ID for this object.
238    *
239    * <p>
240    * A random long generated during the creation of this object.
241    * Allows this object to be differentiated from other similar objects in multi-node environments so that
242    * statistics can be reliably stored in a centralized location.
243    *
244    * @return The globally unique ID for this object.
245    */
246   public long getGuid() { return guid; }
247
248   /**
249    * Returns a hash of this exception that can typically be used to uniquely identify it.
250    *
251    * @return A hash of this exception.
252    */
253   public long getHash() { return hash; }
254
255   /**
256    * Returns the UTC time of the last occurrence of this exception at a specific location in code.
257    *
258    * @return The UTC time of the last occurrence of this exception at a specific location in code.
259    */
260   public long getLastOccurrence() { return lastOccurrence.longValue(); }
261
262   /**
263    * Returns the stack trace of the first exception at a specific location in code.
264    *
265    * @return The stack trace of the first exception at a specific location in code.
266    */
267   public List<String> getStackTrace() { return stackTrace; }
268
269   /**
270    * Returns the exception class.
271    *
272    * @return The exception class.
273    */
274   public Class<?> getThrownClass() { return thrownClass; }
275
276   /**
277    * Increments the occurrence count of this exception.
278    *
279    * @return This object.
280    */
281   public ThrownStats increment() {
282      count.incrementAndGet();
283      lastOccurrence.set(System.currentTimeMillis());
284      causedBy.ifPresent(ThrownStats::increment);
285      return this;
286   }
287
288   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
289      // @formatter:off
290      return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
291         .a(PROP_causedBy, causedBy.orElse(null))
292         .a(PROP_count, getCount())
293         .a(PROP_firstMessage, firstMessage)
294         .a(PROP_firstOccurrence, getFirstOccurrence())
295         .a(PROP_guid, guid)
296         .a(PROP_hash, hash)
297         .a(PROP_lastOccurrence, getLastOccurrence())
298         .a(PROP_stackTrace, stackTrace)
299         .a(PROP_thrownClass, thrownClass);
300      // @formatter:on
301   }
302
303   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
304   public String toString() {
305      return r(properties());
306   }
307}
